assertions.description: Full-wave bridge rectifier (7x SS210 diodes) for 24VAC input not detected as a rectifier circuit
Fuse F1 (140mA/340mA) on input not connected to protection_devices analysis
USB-C connector (J4) present but no USB data analysis or ESD protection check
REVIEW: 7 false positive RF matching networks detected - these are power supply LC filter components (L1 6.8uH, C7 10uF, C4 0.1uF) misidentified as antenna matching circuits
REVIEW: BD9G101G input rail shown as __unnamed_11 - should trace through diode bridge to 24VAC input
REVIEW: AMS1117-3.3 missing input cap warning for +5V rail is incorrect - C7/C9 (10uF) are on the +5V rail from BD9G101G output
REVIEW: BD9G101G estimated Vout=4.04V using 0.6V Vref heuristic - BD9G101G actual Vref is 0.75V giving Vout=5.04V which matches the +5V rail
